title: Quest 4 Slice Toaster Grey - Extra Wide Long Slots for Crumpets and Bagels - 6 Settings - Reheat and Defrost
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: 4 SLICE TOASTER – Combining modern design with practical performance, this grey, 1400W 4 slice toaster with extra wide slots makes a great addition to any home and is ideal for mid to large sized families.

VARIABLE BROWNING CONTROL – With a variable browning control with 6 settings, you can set the toaster so that you get your perfect coloured toast every time or alternatively, use the cancel button mid-toasting to check on the colour.

REHEAT AND DEFROST OPTION – The reheat function means that you can easily warm up toast that has cooled down, perfect for those times when you are busy and miss the toast popping up. The defrost button allows you to toast bread straight from the freezer without the need to leave it defrosting for hours.

CRUMB TRAY AND CORD STORAGE – The toaster’s removable crumb tray makes for easy cleaning and the integrated cord storage helps keep your worktops tidy and fuss-free. For your safety, the toaster is cool touch, has non-slip feet and an anti-jam function for easy toast removal.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description With Variable Browning, Reheat & Defrost 4 Slice Extra Wide Toasters Enjoy freshly toasted bread, crumpets, bagels and more using these 4 Slice Toasters from Quest. Their sleek, modern design helps to save space, and has a variety of features including variable browning, reheat & defrost functions, and a crumb tray. 3 colours are available: black, white, and grey. Previous page Extra Wide Slots The toaster features 4 extra wide slots - ideal not only for bread, but for bagels, crumpets & more. Cord Storage The integrated cord storage helps to keep your worktop tidy when the toaster is not in use. Removable Crumb Tray The toaster includes a crumb tray to prevent mess, which can be removed for easy cleaning. Slimline Design With space for 4 slices, this toaster's slim wide design helps save space compared to a boxy design. Easy Controls Turn the dial to adjust the temperature, or push the reheat & defrost buttons to use their functions Next page 1 Extra Wide Slots 2 Cord Storage 3 Removable Crumb Tray 4 Slimline Design 5 Easy Controls
